title: Retailer takes remedial actions after employee inappropriately texted customer
summary: An individual purchased a product from a retailer, to be delivered at her home. Shortly after the delivery, the retailer’s deliveryperson sent a text message to the individual on her cell phone. In the customer’s opinion, the delivery person made inappropriate comments to her during their brief exchange of text messages. The customer reta...
